title: Solution EU 49511 Peppa Pig Step Stool Seat with Non Slip Feet White
features: Designed under license with Peppa Pig characters
Greater stability with non slip feet Suitable for children aged 18 months and up
description: Peppa Pig Stool The Peppa Pig Toilet Range Has Been Designed So That Your Child Is Comfortable And Safe And At The Same Time Feels Happy To Be Sitting With Their Favorite Cartoon Character. This Brightly Colored Range Has Been Proven To Make A Challenging Experience Much More Fun And Exciting. The Design Is Also Practical, It Is Lightweight And Easily Transportable So You Can Take It With You On Holiday Or At Home. This Stool Has Been Designed With Characters From The Popular Tv Series And Features Peppa Pig And Friends, Which Is A Great Way To Encourage Your Child To Start Toilet Training. For Added Stability, The Stool Has Been Designed With Non Slip Feet And Can Support Up To 80Kg. Warnings And Use. Clean Before Use, With Mild Soap And A Damp Cloth. Do Not Use Aggressive Abrasives. Clean After Each Use. Always Use With Adult Supervision. This Product Is Not A Toy. Never Leave A Child Unattended. Check The Stool Before Each Use. If There Are Any Signs Of Weakness Or Damage, Discard Immediately. Do Not Overload, Maximum Weight 100 Kg. Product Description Peppa Pig Stool, Non Slip Feet, Decorated With Peppa Pig Characters. Robust And Safe. Light. Safety Tested. Part Of The Peppa Pig Toilet Range This Design Is Also Available In A Stable Potty And Seat.
